bead.title: fix(test): update tests/contract.rs ApiVersions assertion to match SUPPORTED_APIS
bead.description: Drift discovered in AR-2026-04-26 alignment review. tests/contract.rs:182-197 hardcodes (2,0,7), (9,0,7), (10,0,3), (11,0,8), (12,0,4), (13,0,4), (14,0,4), (18,0,3), (19,0,6), (20,0,5) but src/protocol/mod.rs:20-39 (post commit 331b93b flexible-version cap) defines (2,0,5), (9,0,5), (10,0,2), (11,0,5), (12,0,3), (13,0,3), (14,0,3), (18,0,2), (19,0,4), (20,0,3). Update the contract test expected vector to match SUPPORTED_APIS (or, better, derive it dynamically from compute_supported_apis). The test currently fails fast on api 2 only because of assertion order, masking the broader divergence.
bead.acceptance: cargo test --test contract passes. Test references SUPPORTED_APIS directly or asserts against the full computed set so future flexible-version policy changes don't desync this test silently.
